creator: jeff@alliante.com
text:
Continuing on my observatsions as I test, I've noticed that some remote folders work just fine and some just fail with Host Not Found. Most of these errors stem from a long URL path such as deep into a .git repository folder.

I wonder if it could be a variable CONST size issue in the QT abstractnetworkjob or other library which is cutting the variable off.

Thoughts? I'm mirroring this brainstorm at 
https://github.com/nextcloud/desktop/issues/6024
